culture.title: ‘Occasionally a picture can change the course of history’: 33 scandalous photos that shocked the world
culture.summary:
When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – which is why these images caused such a stir
Words can tell a story, but it’s pictures that will make you believe in it. Such is the power of a photograph; the ability to strip away illusions, to illumi
culture.content:
When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – which is why these images caused such a stir
Words can tell a story, but it’s pictures that will make you believe in it. Such is the power of a photograph; the ability to strip away illusions, to illuminate something hidden, and sometimes force us to accept unpalatable truths. When it comes to scandal, seeing is believing – occasionally even to the point that a picture changes the course of history.

The UK’s leading AI research institute has been told to make “significant” changes by its main source of taxpa
culture.content:
Alan Turing Institute told by funder to offer better strategy and more value for money after board was reminded of legal duties by watchdog
The UK’s leading AI research institute has been told to make “significant” changes by its main source of taxpayer funding.
The Guardian revealed last week that the board of the Alan Turing Institute was reminded of its legal duties by the charity watchdog after a whistleblower complaint.
